verses.text: God claims every firstborn as His own. Firstborn His. The redeemed firstborn belong wholly to God.
God claims every firstborn as His own. Firstborn His. The redeemed firstborn belong wholly to God.
Moses bids them remember this day of deliverance, brought out 'by strength of hand.' Remember. The day of freedom must never be forgotten.
Moses bids them remember this day of deliverance, brought out 'by strength of hand.' Remember. The day of freedom must never be forgotten.
In the land they shall keep the feast of unleavened bread seven days. The feast. Worship marks them as a freed people.
In the land they shall keep the feast of unleavened bread seven days. The feast. Worship marks them as a freed people.
In the land they shall keep the feast of unleavened bread seven days. The feast. Worship marks them as a freed people.
They shall tell their sons, 'This is done because of that which the LORD did.' A sign. The story is bound on hand and heart.
They shall tell their sons, 'This is done because of that which the LORD did.' A sign. The story is bound on hand and heart.
They shall tell their sons, 'This is done because of that which the LORD did.' A sign. The story is bound on hand and heart.
Every firstborn is the LORD's, but the firstling ass is redeemed with a lamb. Redeemed. Life is bought back by a substitute.
Every firstborn is the LORD's, but the firstling ass is redeemed with a lamb. Redeemed. Life is bought back by a substitute.
Every firstborn is the LORD's, but the firstling ass is redeemed with a lamb. Redeemed. Life is bought back by a substitute.
When the son asks, they answer, 'By strength of hand the LORD brought us out.' Taught. Each generation learns the price of redemption.
When the son asks, they answer, 'By strength of hand the LORD brought us out.' Taught. Each generation learns the price of redemption.
When the son asks, they answer, 'By strength of hand the LORD brought us out.' Taught. Each generation learns the price of redemption.
God leads them not by the Philistine way, lest war turn them back, but through the wilderness. Gentle leading. He spares the weak from too hard a road.
God leads them not by the Philistine way, lest war turn them back, but through the wilderness. Gentle leading. He spares the weak from too hard a road.
Moses takes Joseph's bones, as Israel had sworn. Kept oath. Joseph's faith reaches its fulfilment.
Moses takes Joseph's bones, as Israel had sworn. Kept oath. Joseph's faith reaches its fulfilment.
The LORD goes before them in a pillar of cloud by day and fire by night. Guided. God's presence leads them every step.
The LORD goes before them in a pillar of cloud by day and fire by night. Guided. God's presence leads them every step.
